extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won the 229km stage 12 bunch sprint after UAE positioned Ferrari aggressively, neutralizing QuickStep's leadout despite Gaviria wearing pink jersey.
tactical_patterns: UAE committed Ferrari to leadout despite Gaviria in maglia rosa, revealing team prioritizes stage wins over conserving leader energy.
Bora deployed Zuppa as late-race disruption attack just before flamme rouge to disorganize sprint trains on 229km attrition stage.
QuickStep attempted leadout control but UAE's Ferrari positioning underneath flamme rouge overpowered them in final kilometer compression.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: demonstrated exceptional recovery sprinting after 229km in pink jersey, suggesting GC burden not affecting fast-twitch capacity
rider_signals.FAGLUM KARLSSON Omar: neutral: tactically savvy KOM jersey defense via intermediate point collection rather than breakaway commitment
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: third place despite QuickStep leadout suggests team struggled with positioning on ultra-long stage attrition
rider_signals.ZUPPA Andrea: neutral: late solo flyer beneath flamme rouge indicates Bora willing to sacrifice sprint positioning for disruption tactics
